feature_title: Plan - Main vs HEAD Full Review and Remediation

plan.title: Plan - Main vs HEAD Full Review and Remediation
plan.objective: Perform an exhaustive review of all branch changes relative to main, identify correctness/regression/security/maintainability issues, and remediate confirmed issues with strict tests-first TDD.
in_scope: Produce a complete technical review and close all confirmed in-scope defects.
Reviewed and remediated branch with verification evidence and explicit residual risk notes.
out_of_scope: No unrelated feature work or broad architectural rewrites outside issues directly discovered in this branch delta review.

tasks.summary: Complete main-vs-HEAD review with issue remediation and verification evidence
acceptance_criteria: All changed files are reviewed and findings are captured with severity and rationale
All confirmed issues are fixed and validated with failing-then-passing tests
Independent subagent review is executed after implementation and any findings are resolved

tasks.summary: Run verification for resumed soundspan work
acceptance_criteria: Run the repo-defined ACM verification tests before completion.

source_plan.feature_title: Plan - Main vs HEAD Full Review and Remediation

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Perform an exhaustive review of all branch changes relative to main, identify correctness/regression/security/maintainability issues, and remediate confirmed issues with strict tests-first TDD.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No unrelated feature work or broad architectural rewrites outside issues directly discovered in this branch delta review.

spec_outline.summary: Review all diffs from main to HEAD, validate behavior via targeted tests, and fix confirmed defects while preserving intended feature scope.

full_spec_outline.objective: Produce a complete technical review and close all confirmed in-scope defects.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Reviewed and remediated branch with verification evidence and explicit residual risk notes.
acceptance_criteria: All files changed from main to HEAD are reviewed for correctness, regressions, edge cases, maintainability, and security risks
Each confirmed defect is fixed with strict tests-first TDD and verification evidence
Post-implementation subagent review is completed and findings are either fixed or explicitly documented

refined_spec.summary: Prioritize high-severity correctness and security issues first, then maintainability/simplification opportunities, always proving behavioral safety with targeted failing-then-passing tests.

full_refined_spec.decision: Use severity-ordered triage and batch fixes by shared root cause to reduce churn and retest cost.
full_refined_spec.rationale: A full-branch review can surface many related findings; grouping by root cause improves correctness and keeps changes minimal.
acceptance_criteria: Critical/high issues are addressed before medium/low findings
Each fix includes failing test evidence before implementation
Targeted regression tests cover edge cases introduced by each fix

implementation_plan.summary: Diff, triage, implement TDD fixes in small batches, run targeted verification, then perform independent subagent review and final policy checks.

steps.deliverable: Complete main-vs-HEAD review with issue remediation and verification evidence
acceptance_criteria: All changed files are reviewed and findings are captured with severity and rationale
All confirmed issues are fixed and validated with failing-then-passing tests
Independent subagent review is executed after implementation and any findings are resolved
